title: Coordinate Scan Loader
prompt:
Create a production-ready Coordinate Scan Loader using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Present a calm deterministic loading state for indexing a four-point coordinate grid. A teal scan bar moves through four labelled rows as the user advances with a Next checkpoint button; the current row reads as active and the overall status is announced. This controlled interaction makes the loader useful in compact and detail previews without relying on an unbounded timer. Use #F4F5F6 around a white Bento card with #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F support text. Teal is the only bright accent, and the card itself has no gradient.

Use a real button with a 44px target to advance or restart the scan, plus a polite aria-live status. Each row needs text and shape changes so progress does not depend on color. Click, Enter, and Space invoke the same action. Hover lifts the button 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Move the scan bar with a spring of stiffness 300 and damping 25; fade status copy over 160ms. The completed state must remain visible until the user restarts. Use local state only: no timers, intervals, random values, storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px preserve row labels and a full-width action. At larger widths keep the grid intentionally compact. Maintain logical focus order, a visible 3px dark focus ring, AA contrast, and an explicit completed label. Prefer transform and opacity, respect prefers-reduced-motion with an instant position change or 120ms fade, and return complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:

A1 / intake

*/ .uiwiki-scan{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-scan p{min-height:36px;margin:8px 0;padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-left:4px solid #0d9488;border-radius:12px;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-scan button{min-height:44px;width:100%;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-scan button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-scan *{transition:none}}
